zh.lifeSummary: 當Seigneur Giroldus FitzGerold de la Ville Tancréde - Seigneur Gérold de Roumara - le Dapifero de Normandie et Châtelain de Neufmarché於1035年之前出生在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利坦卡維爾時，他的父親Geraldus I de la Ville Tancrède95歲，母親Helissende de Abbetot42歲。他和Albreda de Normandie Lady de Roumare至少有3個兒子。他去世於1085年在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利盧馬雷，埋葬在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利盧。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.
Chinese:

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Ville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: 1 English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Déville in Seine-Maritime, France, probably named with Latin dei villa ‘settlement of (i.e. under the protection of) God’. This name was interpreted early on as a prepositional phrase de ville or de val and applied to dwellers in a town or valley ( see Ville and Vale ).

2 English: nickname from Middle English devyle, Old English dēofol ‘devil’ (Latin diabolus, from Greek diabolos ‘slanderer’, ‘enemy’), referring to a mischievous youth or perhaps to someone who had acted the role of the Devil in a pageant or mystery play.
3 French: variant of Ville , with the preposition de.

variants.name: Devall
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Déville in Seine-Maritime. The full form was de Daiville but when the preposition was omitted, Daiville was taken to be for de Aiville.
English: alternatively the name may be from Middle English devel (Old English dēofol) ‘devil, Satan’, possibly acquired as a pageant name or as a shortened form of a longer nickname; compare Deeble .
Altered form of French   Duval   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname. Compare   Duvall  .

variants.name: Vale
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Abilio, Angel, Fernando, Jose Joel, Miguel, Pedro, Roberto, Adriana, Alberto, Alfredo.

English: of Norman origin, a topographic name for someone who lived ‘(in the) vale or valley’ (Middle English val(e), valle, Old French val ‘valley’), or a habitational name for someone who came from one of the French places called with this word, such as Le Val (Sarthe) or any number of places in and around Normandy called Vaux. Compare Vause .
Irish: from Mac Pháil ‘son of Paul’.

nameMeanings.name: Tancréde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Rocco, Salvatore, Silvio, Aniello, Carmino, Gaetano, Giovanni, Guido, Italo, Luigi, Pasquale.
Italian: from the personal name Tancredi, composed of the ancient Germanic elements thank ‘thought’ + rēd ‘counsel, advice’.

variants.name: Tranchina
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Sal, Salvatore, Angelo, Luigi, Sebastiano.
Italian (Sicily): possibly from the personal name Tranchida, derived from Tancrida, feminine form of the personal name Tancredi .

variants.name: Tango
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Antonio, Domenic, Gioia, Raffaela, Rocco, Vito.

Italian: probably from a personal name of ancient Germanic origin composed with the element thank ‘thought’ (see Tancredi ); alternatively, perhaps in some cases, from the Italian Greek name Tangos, unexplained.

variants.name: Tangredi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rocco, Salvatore, Amedeo, Aniello, Dino.
Italian (Campania): variant of   Tancredi  .

nameMeanings.name: FitzGerold
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which is a patronymic from the personal name Gerald formed by the addition of the Anglo-Norman French prefix fi(t)z ‘son of ’.

en.lifeSummary: When Seigneur Giroldus FitzGerold de la Ville Tancréde - Seigneur Gérold de Roumara - le Dapifero de Normandie et Châtelain de Neufmarché was born before 1035, in Tancarville, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France, his father, Geraldus I de la Ville Tancrède, was 95 and his mother, Helissende de Abbetot, was 42. He had at least 3 sons with Albreda de Normandie Lady de Roumare. He died in 1085, in Roumare, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France, and was buried in Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Seigneur Giroldus FitzGerold de la Ville Tancréde - Seigneur Gérold de Roumara - le Dapifero de Normandie et Châtelain de Neufmarché est né avant 1035, à Tancarville, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France, son père, Geraldus I de la Ville Tancrède, avait 95 ans et sa mère, Helissende de Abbetot, avait 42 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils avec Albreda de Normandie Lady de Roumare. Il est décédé en 1085, à Roumare, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France, et a été enterré à Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Seigneur Giroldus FitzGerold de la Ville Tancréde - Seigneur Gérold de Roumara - le Dapifero de Normandie et Châtelain de Neufmarché vor 1035 in Tancarville, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Geraldus I de la Ville Tancrède 95 und seine Mutter Helissende de Abbetot 42. Er hatte mit Albreda de Normandie Lady de Roumare mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1085 in Roumare, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Seigneur Giroldus FitzGerold de la Ville Tancréde - Seigneur Gérold de Roumara - le Dapifero de Normandie et Châtelain de Neufmarché è nato il prima del 1035 nel Tancarville, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Geraldus I de la Ville Tancrède, aveva 95 anni e il suo madre, Helissende de Abbetot, aveva 42 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli con Albreda de Normandie Lady de Roumare. Morì nel 1085, nel Roumare, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, e fu sepolto a Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Seigneur Giroldus FitzGerold de la Ville Tancréde - Seigneur Gérold de Roumara - le Dapifero de Normandie et Châtelain de Neufmarchéが1035年以前にフランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメタンカーヴィルで生まれた時，父Geraldus I de la Ville Tancrèdeは95歳，母Helissende de Abbetotは42歳であった。彼はAlbreda de Normandie Lady de Roumareとの間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。彼は1085年にフランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメロウマアで死去し，フランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメロウンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Seigneur Giroldus FitzGerold de la Ville Tancréde - Seigneur Gérold de Roumara - le Dapifero de Normandie et Châtelain de Neufmarché(이)가 1035년 이전 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 탠카빌에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geraldus I de la Ville Tancrède(은)는 95세였고, 그의 어머니 Helissende de Abbetot(은)는 42세였다. 그는 Albreda de Normandie Lady de Roumare(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1085년 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 루마에서 사망했으며 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 루언에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Seigneur Giroldus FitzGerold de la Ville Tancréde - Seigneur Gérold de Roumara - le Dapifero de Normandie et Châtelain de Neufmarché nasceu antes 1035, em Tancarville, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França, seu pai, Geraldus I de la Ville Tancrède, tinha 95 anos e sua mãe, Helissende de Abbetot, tinha 42 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos com Albreda de Normandie Lady de Roumare. Ele faleceu em 1085, em Roumare, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França, e foi sepultado em Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Seigneur Giroldus FitzGerold de la Ville Tancréde - Seigneur Gérold de Roumara - le Dapifero de Normandie et Châtelain de Neufmarché родился перед 1035 г. в местности танкарвилл, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Geraldus I de la Ville Tancrède было 95 лет, а матери, которую звали Helissende de Abbetot, 42. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына от Albreda de Normandie Lady de Roumare. Он умер в 1085 г. в местности роумар, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция и был похоронен в местности роуен, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Seigneur Giroldus FitzGerold de la Ville Tancréde - Seigneur Gérold de Roumara - le Dapifero de Normandie et Châtelain de Neufmarché nació antes de 1035, en Tancarville, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Geraldus I de la Ville Tancrède, tenía 95 años y su mamá, Helissende de Abbetot, tenía 42 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos con Albreda de Normandie Lady de Roumare. Murió en 1085, en Roumare, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, y fue sepultado en Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia.
